mapper.sql: id, task_id, task_type, task_name, status, request_id, algorithm_version, aircraft_id, subsystem_id, equipment_id, component_id, business_object_id, business_object_level, business_object_name, feature_analysis_task_id, summary_result, result_value, result_unit, request_json, result_json, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, remark
mapper.select: select from t3_algorithm_task_results where task_id = #{taskId} limit 1
select from t3_algorithm_task_results where task_type = #{taskType} and remark = #{remark} and status in ('PENDING', 'RUNNING') order by created_at desc, id desc limit 1
select from t3_algorithm_task_results where feature_analysis_task_id = #{flowTaskId} and task_type = 'FEATURE_PROCESSING' and status = 'SUCCESS' order by created_at desc, id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into t3_algorithm_task_results ( task_id, task_type, task_name, status, request_id, algorithm_version, aircraft_id, subsystem_id, equipment_id, component_id, business_object_id, business_object_level, business_object_name, feature_analysis_task_id, summary_result, result_value, result_unit, request_json, result_json, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, remark ) values ( #{taskId}, #{taskType}, #{taskName}, #{status}, #{requestId}, #{algVersion}, #{aircraftId}, #{subsystemId}, #{equipmentId}, #{componentId}, #{bizId}, #{bizLevel}, #{bizName}, #{featTaskId}, #{summary}, #{resultVal}, #{resultUnit}, #{reqJson}, #{resJson}, #{errMsg}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, now(), now(), #{remark} )
mapper.update:
update t3_algorithm_task_results
task_type = #{taskType}, task_name = #{taskName}, status = #{status}, request_id = #{requestId}, algorithm_version = #{algVersion}, aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}, subsystem_id = #{subsystemId}, equipment_id = #{equipmentId}, component_id = #{componentId}, business_object_id = #{bizId}, business_object_level = #{bizLevel}, business_object_name = #{bizName}, feature_analysis_task_id = #{featTaskId}, summary_result = #{summary}, result_value = #{resultVal}, result_unit = #{resultUnit}, request_json = #{reqJson}, result_json = #{resJson}, error_message = #{errMsg}, started_at = #{startAt}, finished_at = #{endAt}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = now()
where task_id = #{taskId}
and (status not in ('SUCCESS', 'FAILED', 'CANCELED') or status = #{status})
mapper.select:
select from t3_algorithm_task_results
order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}

select from t3_algorithm_task_results
order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}

select from ( select t.*, row_number() over ( partition by coalesce(t.feature_analysis_task_id, t.task_id) order by case t.task_type when 'FAULT_PREDICT' then 4 when 'EARLY_DEGRADATION_POINT_DETECT' then 3 when 'FEATURE_PROCESSING' then 2 when 'FEATURE_ANALYSIS' then 1 else 0 end desc, t.created_at desc, t.id desc ) as rn from t3_algorithm_task_results t
) x where x.rn = 1 order by x.created_at desc, x.id desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}

select from t3_algorithm_task_results
order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
